name: better-hermes-desktop
description: Hermes Desktop — local-first AI agent companion with multi-pane chat, full slash-command arsenal, model CRUD, FTS5 session search, conflict-aware remote file editing, tabbed SSH terminals, and 15-platform gateway management

scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k -n vite,electron -c cyan,magenta "vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron ."
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && npm run build:electron && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json5
scripts.electron:build:win: npm run build && npm run build:electron && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json5 --win
scripts.electron:build:mac: npm run build && npm run build:electron && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json5 --mac
scripts.electron:build:linux: npm run build && npm run build:electron && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json5 --linux
scripts.electron:build:all: npm run build && npm run build:electron && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json5 -mwl
